text.title: Core VUI Design Principles Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree from observable signals to a rule-grounded conclusion.

decision-tree.root-question: Is this a multi-turn voice dialog?

conclusion.verdict: apply all three principles; declare context window explicitly
principles overkill; standard usability covers it
use audio UX patterns, not VUI principles

example.trace: recipe assistant with step-by-step → multi-turn → all 3 principles applied

text.example: Trace through the tree producing the leaf conclusion.
